'''dhawugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cracknut|cracknut]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-w-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cracknut|cracknut]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhawugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæwigith|dhæwigith]] || [[word:dhæwigij|dhæwigij]] || [[word:dhæwigish|dhæwigish]] || [[word:dhæwigi|dhæwigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhawuwuguth|dhawuwuguth]] || [[word:dhawuwuguj|dhawuwuguj]] || [[word:dhawuwugush|dhawuwugush]] || [[word:dhawuwugu|dhawuwugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhawuguth|dhawuguth]] || [[word:dhawuguj|dhawuguj]] || [[word:dhawugush|dhawugush]] || [[word:dhawugu|dhawugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhawufguth|dhawufguth]] || [[word:dhawufguj|dhawufguj]] || [[word:dhawufgush|dhawufgush]] || [[word:dhawufguf|dhawufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhawuguthu|dhawuguthu]] || [[word:dhawuguju|dhawuguju]] || [[word:dhawugushu|dhawugushu]] || [[word:dhawuguku|dhawuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhawuguth|dhawuguth]] || [[word:dhawuguj|dhawuguj]] || [[word:dhawugush|dhawugush]] || [[word:dhawugu|dhawugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhawuguthul|dhawuguthul]] || [[word:dhawugujul|dhawugujul]] || [[word:dhawugushul|dhawugushul]] || [[word:dhawugukul|dhawugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhawuguthuthu|dhawuguthuthu]] || [[word:dhawugujuju|dhawugujuju]] || [[word:dhawugushushu|dhawugushushu]] || [[word:dhawuguku|dhawuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhawuguthun|dhawuguthun]] || [[word:dhawugujun|dhawugujun]] || [[word:dhawugushun|dhawugushun]] || [[word:dhawugukun|dhawugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhawuguthuoro|dhawuguthuoro]] || [[word:dhawugujuoro|dhawugujuoro]] || [[word:dhawugushuoro|dhawugushuoro]] || [[word:dhawugukuoro|dhawugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
